name: Frolic Fold-Out Mouthpiece
summary: Frolic Fold-Out Mouthpiece — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Ergonomic fold-out mouthpiece accessory designed specifically for the Frolic Thermal Extractor, offering improved draw comfort, controlled airflow, and a durable heat-safe construction ideal for daily use. The Frolic Fold-Out Mouthpiece is a purpose-built upgrade for the Frolic Thermal Extractor, engineered to enhance user comfort and airflow performance. Precision CNC-machined from high-grade Ultem, it features a smooth fold-out angle, full rotational adjustment, and a refined internal air channel that promotes a cooler, smoother inhalation experience. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
